description: PR-mined: modeled after the real merged StreetComplete PR #6318 'util: handle duplicate elements in Collection.containsExactlyInAnyOrder()' (2025-08-13), which fixed containsExactlyInAnyOrder to use a count-map instead of a naive containsAll check. That fix is already baked into our pinned commit (26c673030a09..., tag v63.2), so a literal forward-patch of the PR's own diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit reuses the same count-map idiom for a new, related helper: mostCommonOrNull().
